Package com.dua3.utility.fx.controls

Class RichTextBuilderFx

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.text.RichTextBuilder
com.dua3.utility.text.RichTextBuilderExtBase<javafx.scene.Node,RichTextBuilderFx>
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.RichTextBuilderFx
All Implemented Interfaces:
RichTextRuns, ToRichText, Appendable, CharSequence, Iterable<Run>
public class RichTextBuilderFx extends RichTextBuilderExtBase<javafx.scene.Node,RichTextBuilderFx>
JavaFX rich-text builder with support for inline JavaFX nodes.

  • Nested Class Summary

    RichTextBuilderExtBase.ButtonData, RichTextBuilderExtBase.HyperlinkData

    Creates an inline node representation for the provided image.

    Creates an inline image node from the given image, scaled to fit within the specified maximum width and height.

    • createImage

      protected javafx.scene.Node createImage(Image image)
      Description copied from class: RichTextBuilderExtBase
      Creates an inline node representation for the provided image.

      Returns:
      the newly created inline node representing the image

    • createImage

      protected javafx.scene.Node createImage(Image image, float maxWidth, float maxHeight)
      Description copied from class: RichTextBuilderExtBase
      Creates an inline image node from the given image, scaled to fit within the specified maximum width and height.
      Specified by:
      createImage in class RichTextBuilderExtBase<javafx.scene.Node,RichTextBuilderFx>
      Parameters:
      image - the image to create an inline node for
      maxWidth - the maximum width to scale the image to
      maxHeight - the maximum height to scale the image to
      Returns:
      the created image node
